evals.prompt: Refactor ShapeCalculator.java to follow our Java 25 coding conventions. The class uses old-style instanceof with casts, abstract class hierarchy instead of sealed types and records, manual string building, and Collections.unmodifiableList instead of modern collection factories.
evals.expected_output: Refactored with: sealed interface Shape, record subtypes (Circle, Rectangle, Triangle), switch expression with pattern matching for area/describe, streams for filtering, List.of/List.copyOf, all variables final

assertions.text: All local variables and parameters use final or final var
Uses pattern matching instead of instanceof + cast
Uses switch expressions with arrow syntax

evals.prompt: Refactor ApiResponse.java to follow our Java 25 conventions. It's a manually-written immutable class that should be a record, uses old-style string concatenation instead of text blocks, old-style Collections.unmodifiable* instead of List.copyOf, and an if-else chain for status categories instead of a switch expression.
evals.expected_output: Record-based ApiResponse with: compact constructor for validation, List.copyOf for errors, text block for JSON template, switch expression for status category, final var where appropriate

assertions.text: All local variables and parameters use final or final var
No method exceeds ~20 lines of logic

evals.prompt: Write a Java 25 event processing system. Create a sealed interface Event with record subtypes: UserCreated(String userId, String email), OrderPlaced(String orderId, String userId, List<String> items), and PaymentProcessed(String paymentId, double amount, boolean successful). Then write an EventProcessor class with a method that processes events using pattern matching and returns a summary string. Include a method that groups events by type.
evals.expected_output: Sealed Event interface with record subtypes, EventProcessor using switch pattern matching, streams for grouping, List.of/List.copyOf, final var, text blocks for multi-line output

assertions.text: All local variables and parameters use final or final var
Uses switch expressions for event dispatch
